sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Coins, TrendingUp, Clock, ShieldCheck, ArrowUpRight, Zap, Plus, History // Added icon for history } from 'lucide-react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; export default function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [myListings, setMyListings] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('myListings')) || []; setMyListings(saved); }, []); return (
{/* 1. HEADER SECTION */}

Dashboard

Welcome back, Arjun! Here is your barter summary.

{/* 2. TOP STAT CARDS (The Original Structure) */}

Available Balance

1,450 WTK

Trust Rating

4.9/5.0

Active Barters

08

{/* 3. YOUR DYNAMIC LISTINGS SECTION */}

My New Listings

{myListings.length > 0 ? ( myListings.slice(0, 4).map((item) => (

{item.title}

{item.wtk} WTK

)) ) : (

No listings added yet.

)}
{/* 4. HISTORY SECTION (Recent Activity) */}

Recent Activity History

{[ { user: "Sarah J.", action: "accepted your trade", item: "Professional Camera", time: "2h ago", val: "+450", status: 'plus' }, { user: "Rahul K.", action: "sent a message regarding", item: "Python Tutoring", time: "5h ago", val: "INFO", status: 'neutral' }, { user: "Adarsh P.", action: "purchased listing", item: "Hammer Drill", time: "1d ago", val: "-120", status: 'minus' }, ].map((activity, i) => (
{activity.user[0]}

{activity.user} {activity.action}

{activity.item}

{activity.val}

{activity.time}

))}
); }
